content:
Thrilled to share that my latest legal article has been published on Times Law! ⚖️📖

📝 Title: AI-Generated Evidence in Criminal Trials: Challenges, Safeguards, and Justice
Artificial Intelligence is rapidly transforming criminal investigations and court proceedings. While AI-generated evidence offers new possibilities, it also raises significant concerns regarding authenticity, admissibility, privacy, bias, and procedural fairness.

In this article, I examine:-
🔹 The role of AI-generated evidence in criminal trials
🔹 Key legal and ethical challenges
🔹 Safeguards required for fair admissibility
🔹 The future of AI and criminal justice in India

This publication reflects my continued interest in criminal law, legal research, and the evolving intersection of law and technology.

I would be grateful for your thoughts, feedback, and discussions on this emerging area of law.

🔗 Read the full article here:-
https://lnkd.in/gaPv6qAB

Nargis ~ 
Mohd Azeem
